basic_details.job_title: Central University of Punjab Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant , Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Punjab has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Research Assistant, Field Investigator Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 25-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in Social Science/Geography/ Environment and Sustainability discipline with minimum 55% marks, Graduation in Social Science/Geography/ Environment and Sustainability discipline with minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Post Graduation in Social Science/Geography/ Environment and Sustainability discipline with minimum 55% marks for GEN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC recognised University/ Institutes. Field Investigator: Graduation in Social Science/Geography/ Environment and Sustainability discipline with minimum 55% marks for GEN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC recognised University/ Institutes.

salary_details.details: Research Assistant: ₹ 37,000/- per month Field Investigator: ₹ 20,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Punjab Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant / Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these positions?
faq.answer: For Research Assistant, a Post Graduation degree is required. For Field Investigator, a Graduation degree is necessary. Both require a minimum of 55% marks in Social Science, Geography, or Environment and Sustainability disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these recruitment positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for Research Assistant is ₹37,000/- per month, and for Field Investigator, it is ₹20,000/- per month. The exact salary may depend on experience and other factors.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for these roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Interaction cum Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for the Central University of Punjab recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is via Email. Candidates need to prepare their application and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for Research Assistant and Field Investigator?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Assistant post and one vacancy for the Field Investigator post, making a total of two vacancies announced by the Central University of Punjab.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Research Assistant and Field Investigator are contractual in nature. This means the employment is for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. Does the university offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates belonging to reserved categories should refer to the official notification for specific information on age relaxation policies.
